task_completion.description: Agent searches for the Colosseum or enters coordinates in the mapping application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the mapping application search bar with 'Colosseum', 'Rome', or coordinates '41.8902, 12.4922' entered.

task_completion.description: The mapping application successfully navigates to and displays the Colosseum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the aerial/satellite view of the Colosseum amphitheater structure, or coordinates in the status bar matching approx 41.89°N, 12.49°E.

task_completion.description: Agent opens a text editor or creates the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a text editor (e.g., Text Editor, Nano, Vim) open or a terminal command creating 'imagery_date_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent records the location name and coordinates in the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor content visible showing 'Location: Colosseum' (or similar) and coordinates '41.8902, 12.4922'.

task_completion.description: Agent records the Imagery Date and Eye Altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor content visible showing a date (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD format) and an 'Eye Altitude' (or 'Eye alt') value.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed report to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a save dialog with path '/home/ga/imagery_date_report.txt' or a terminal command verifying the file exists at that path.

integrity.description: Agent must use the GUI of a mapping application to retrieve data, not a web browser search or external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the interface of a desktop mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) being used to view the location.

integrity.description: The data entered in the report must correspond to what is displayed in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Eye Altitude' and 'Imagery Date' in the text file should match the values visible in the mapping application's status bar or information overlay in previous frames.

integrity.description: Agent should not output the file content via a single terminal command without opening the mapping tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen navigating the map before the full report content is finalized.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Colosseum, Rome. Coordinates: 41.8902°N, 12.4922°E. The VLM should verify the agent navigates to this location in the mapping software.
